name: ollama-smart-router
description: Intelligent Ollama model router with resource awareness for OpenClaw

tools.name: ollama_route
tools.description: Route to the best available Ollama model based on task type and system resources. Automatically handles vision, chat, and image generation tasks.

task.description: Task type to route: auto (auto-detect), chat (text), vision (image understanding), image_generation (image creation)

images_b64.description: Base64 encoded images for vision tasks

preference.description: Model preference: speed (smaller/faster) or quality (larger/more capable)

max_retries.description: Maximum number of model fallback attempts

keep_alive.description: Model keep-alive duration in seconds or duration string (e.g., '2m'). Use 0 to release immediately after use.

allowedModels.description: Whitelist of model names to use. If empty, all available models are candidates.

defaultPreference.description: Default model preference when not specified in request
